Facebook Lingo and Acronyms
Facebook Lingo and Acronyms
Facebook Glossary
Whether you're new to Facebook ads, or have been up to your elbows in CTRs and
CPMs since way back at the start of the Power Editor days (RIP), you're bound to come
across a term or metric that you don't understand every now and then. Facebook has
a glossary of common terms and their definitions here, and we've also created a
cheat sheet of acronyms that you'll find commonly used in FATC below.
Common Acronyms
We've compiled a list of common acronyms you'll come across below. It's also
available as a downloadable PDF which you'll find in the Downloads section on the
right.
Downloads
FATC_Common_Acronyms.pdf
Need Help?
If at any stage along your FATC journey
you feel like you need some help, reach
out to one of the crew inside the
Facebook group. Or sign up for one of
the Q&A calls. We've got your back!
